c.d: The ability of the app to work across multiple operating systems and devices, enabling seamless access to notes anywhere
Tools for organizing notes such as tags, folders, notebooks, sections, and search capabilities
Support for stylus input, handwriting-to-text conversion, and diagram/sketch integration
Features allowing multiple users to share, edit, and comment on notes together
Whether the app offers free usage and what premium or paid features exist
Ability to embed images, audio, video, tables, and other media types in notes
How clean, minimalistic or feature-rich the app interface is for distraction-free note-taking
Ability to perform quick search within notes and retrieve older versions of notes
